data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Protection against Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield and AWS WAF provide multi-layered defense mechanisms.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encryption of data at rest and in transit using standardized protocols.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit and server-side encryption for data at rest.

data.title: IAM Policies
data.description: Strict Identity and Access Management policies to restrict unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Role-based access control with granular permissions.

data.title: Security Incident Monitoring
data.description: Real-time monitoring and incident response for security threats.
data.technical_spec: Amazon GuardDuty and CloudWatch provide continuous threat detection.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Routine security assessments to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Performed using AWS Inspector and third-party penetration testing services.
